productDisplayName: ADIDAS Men Sports Black Sports Shoes
description: NEW HITS ON THE BLOCK An absolute hard court classic, the adidas Barricade 6.0 shoe is a best selling, highest performance tennis shoe ever created world over. An improvised and bettered version of the adidas Barricade, the version 6.0 tennis shoes has been re-engineered with three TPU overlay strips that represent the Adidas logo of perseverance and strength, as well as adds that extra stability to the upper. It also has a stability claw technology for quick cuts and fast footwork, making it a sure-footed performance shoe. Besides, the forefoot of this range of shoes is employed with AdiPRENE+ technology to maintain propulsion and enhance efficiency during a game of hard court tennis. AdiPRENE+ is a technology where resilient cushioning is used to protect the forefoot and provide a responsive and dynamic toe-off, ensuring a faster and springier gait.Easing out your movesAn ideal combination of durability, cushioning and support, Adidas Barricade 6.0 shoes also have AdiPRENE inserts made of highly shock absorbent material in the heel to enhance cushioning and protect the feet from impact. This makes it the most preferred and best selling hard court tennis shoes for players who are both under and over pronators.Weighing just about 482 grams, the Adidas Barricade range of tennis shoes are made of lightweight uppers and ultra durable TPU toe guards. Added to this lightweight comfort is a textile lining and moulded EVA insole that makes the shoe snugly wrap around the foot and ensure anatomical comfort. Complete with comfort features, the Adidas Barricade 6.0 version of tennis shoes are engineered with a Torsion System in the midfoot, ensuring absolute motion control during both, linear and lateral movement. Torsionability is the foot’s ability to adapt to any surface, without forcing the rearfoot to excessively move and stress itself out. The Adidas Torsion System, therefore, protects the feet from injuries, providing that much-required comfort and support especially when playing tennis on hard courts.For the hard playersIf you are talking about the ultimate in durability for outsoles, there’s nothing to look beyond the AdiWEAR 6 technology employed in Adidas Barricade 6.0 shoes. Specially designed to suit hard court tennis shoes, the AdiWEAR technology enhance durability of the outsole, elongating shoe life by reducing wear and tear.If you love a hard round of tennis, then look no further than this Adidas Barricade 6.0 shoe for absolute performance. Stylish and comfortable, you can also own a separate pair for casual wear around the town.UpperSynthetic leather upper for lightweight and durability Circular meshes for ventilation Ultra durable TPU toe guard AdiPRENE+ in forefoot for propulsion and efficiency Synthetic laces for snug FitInsoleTextile lining and moulded EVA for anatomical comfort Moulded and padded EVA sockliner for snug fitMidsoleShock-absorbing lightweight Phylon midsole for added comfortOutsoleTORSION System for adaptive midfoot support AdiPRENE technology under the heel for superior cushioning during impact AdiWEAR 6 outsole at pivot point for 360 degree rotation of foot and high durability Stability claws to maintain quick cuts and fast footworkShoe careWipe surface with soft, clean, damp clothDo not machine wash
